SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF ROBERT MCCARTHY IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS VALERIE MCCARTHY (WIFE). DEFENDANT YOEL MAZARIEGOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS COURT TO PROVIDE A SPANISH INTERPRETER AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO (CSR# 300802). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAZARIEGOS, YOEL $351.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $476.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.
